name: E-1 severity override: severity off makes rule_will_run=false in doctor --explain output
command: printf 'rules:\n  g-ts-001: "off"\n' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-001 --profile p.yaml 2>err.txt; grep -q 'effective_severity=off' err.txt && grep -q 'rule_will_run=false' err.txt && echo gated 1>&2
